══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dwarf — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dwarf — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Dwarf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══

REASONING: Multiattack on Dwarf — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dwarf — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 32 damage. Dwarf — Armored Escapist HP: 27/59
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Dwarf — Armored Escapist HP: 14/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Dwarf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 14/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dwarf — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
